document.title: BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy 승인원 [Approval Sheet]

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval package for BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy, part no. PSM-000112, revised for COVER_WIRED_CABLE_UPPER magnet mounting tolerance change.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as supplier/customer approval documentation covering revision history, process flow, PQCP, inspection records, work standards, appearance inspection, packing method, and attachments.
keyPoints: Customer is ㈜H&abyz and supplier is 국제통상.
Rev. 1 revision date is 2026.02.25 with change detail: COVER_WIRED_CABLE_UPPER Magnet 장착부 공차 변경.
RoHS-controlled substances include Pb, Hg, Cr6+, DEHP, BBP, DBP, and DIBP at 0.1% / 1,000 ppm, and Cd at 0.01% / 100 ppm.
Cable processing specification includes 7,000 mm ±100 cutting length.
Outgoing inspection uses KS A ISO 2589-1:2001, normal inspection level II, AQL 1.0.

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy.
evidence.evidenceText: 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet]; 제품명(PRODUCT NAME), BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy

evidence.claim: The part/model number for the approval sheet is PSM-000112.
evidence.evidenceText: 도번(Model No.), PSM-000112; 도번(PART NO) : PSM-000112

evidence.claim: The applicable models are G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, and G1417FWP.
Rev. 1 was issued on 2026.02.25 for COVER_WIRED_CABLE_UPPER Magnet mounting tolerance change.
The control plan category is SOP.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category, □ DVS, □ PVS, □ PRS, ■ SOP

evidence.claim: Cable cutting length specification is 7,000 mm ±100.
RoHS limits include Pb at 0.1% / 1,000 ppm.
RoHS limits include Cd at 0.01% / 100 ppm.
Outgoing inspection references KS A ISO 2589-1:2001, normal inspection level II, AQL 1.0.
evidence.evidenceText: 검사방법, KS A ISO 2589-1 : 2001 (통상검사 수준 Ⅱ, AQL 1.0)

evidence.claim: Continuity inspection uses DS-064-DHT continuity tester and treats PASS with buzzer as good condition.
evidence.evidenceText: DS-064-DHT 도통 검사기; PASS / 부저음 발생; 양품

evidence.claim: The attached wire product specification references UL758 and customer requirements.

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not identify FDA or any regulatory authority/jurisdiction.
Source is a preprocessed spreadsheet-style combined text with table artifacts and inconsistent date formats such as 2026/02/25, 2/25/26, and 2026.02.25.
The package contains multiple embedded supplier documents and attachments with separate dates and document numbers.
